title: selliguea lauterbachii
intro: Selliguea lauterbachii, also known as Polyscias lauterbachii or the S. lauterbachii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to New Guinea and nearby islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selliguea lauterbachii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin infections, as well as being used as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for wound healing and skin care.
